463: /// Extract references from commit messages on a branch.
464: fn extract_references_for_branch(
465:     state: &StackState,
466:     branch: &str,
467:     parent: &str,
468: ) -> Option<String> {
469:     let range = format!("{parent}..{branch}");
470:     let messages = git::log_full_messages(&range).unwrap_or_default();
471:     if messages.is_empty() {
472:         return None;
473:     }
474: 
475:     let extracted = crate::commit_refs::extract_refs_from_messages(&messages);
476:     if extracted.is_empty() {
477:         return None;
478:     }
479: 
480:     // Build stack PR number map for resolving plain #N references.
481:     let mut stack_prs = std::collections::HashMap::new();
482:     for (name, meta) in &state.branches {
483:         if let Some(num) = meta.pr_number {
484:             let url = crate::stack_body::pr_url_for_branch_pub(state, name)
485:                 .unwrap_or_default();
486:             stack_prs.insert(num, (name.clone(), url));
487:         }
488:     }
